flashcards.definition: Multiple choice (45 questions, 105 min) + Free response (6 questions, 90 min).
Some sections allow graphing calculators; others require algebraic/analytic methods.
AP free response requires written justification; 'because f'(x) changes sign' type reasoning.
Many AP questions give graphs of f, f', or f'' and ask about the others.
AP often gives real-world context; answers should include appropriate units.
